original_image_tags: Microfilm scan of a typed report page. Two hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin. The classification marking "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large block letters at both the top and bottom of the page. A handwritten number "96" is visible in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: A typed document containing text describing a UFO sighting involving 'four flying saucers' and a 'huge jelly-fish flash'. The word 'RESTRICTED' is stamped at the top and bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content: a typed document with 'RESTRICTED' stamped at the top and bottom, with Description B omitting other details like hole-punch marks and a handwritten number but not contradicting any specific visual claim.
